title: The Crime of the Century
writer: Walter Maria Espe, Florence Ryerson, Brian Marlow
actors: Jean Hersholt, Wynne Gibson, Stuart Erwin
plot: A doctor who is also a "mentalist" confesses to a murder. The only problem is that the murder he's confessed to hasn't happened yet--although dead bodies are now starting to turn up all over the place. A reporter sets out to solve...
